chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-1232 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 06.03.2025 Mr. Nisar Ahmed Abro, Deputy Attorney General.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner nor intimation received and same was position on the last date of hearing viz. 25-10-2023. Record reflects that no efforts were made to proceed with the matter, thus, the instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
